title: wolfhsm: auth.rs and she.rs (features=auth,she)
description: auth.rs (feature=auth): wrap wh_Client_Auth* — set_credentials(client,user_id:u16,token:&[u8])->Result<(),Error>. she.rs (feature=she): wrap wh_Client_She* functions for the SHE automotive key management protocol. See wolfHSM she header for full API surface.
